name: conversation mode — processMessage with mock SUCCESS provider → ok:true, mode=CONVERSATION_RESPONSE, message non-empty, no provider_failed flag (PHASE-16 regression guard)
description: RED (before fix): handleConversationMode with success path returns ok:false or message empty → assertions fail. GREEN (after fix + existing gate): monkey-patched provider returns SUCCESS → mode=CONVERSATION_RESPONSE, ok=true, message non-empty, provider_failed is NOT set → all assertions pass.
